title: juncus squarrosus subsp. ellmanii
intro: Juncus squarrosus subsp. ellmanii, also known as the Square-stemmed Rush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, characterized by its distinctive square stem and flat, green leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The Square-stemmed Rush is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, due to its rich composition of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Juncus squarrosus subsp. ellmanii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
